_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive
author: alex@hostsrc.com
description: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive is a multiplayer first-person shooter video game developed by Hidden Path Entertainment and Valve Corporation.
startup: ./srcds_run -game csgo -console +game_type {{GAME_TYPE}} +game_mode {{GAME_MODE}} +ip 0.0.0.0 -port {{SERVER_PORT}} +map {{SRCDS_MAP}} +sv_setsteamaccount {{STEAM_ACC}} -tickrate {{SRCDS_TICKRATE}} +mapgroup {{SRCDS_MAPGROUP}} -maxplayers_override {{MAX_PLAYERS}} $( [ "$NOBOTS" == "0" ] || printf %s '-nobots' ) $( [ "$NOMASTER" == "0" ] || printf %s '-nomaster' ) $( [ "$INSECURE" == "0" ] || printf %s '-insecure' ) $( [ "$NOHLTV" == "0" ] || printf %s '-nohltv' ) -autoupdate -steam_dir /home/container/steamcmd -steamcmd_script /home/container/steamcmd/{{SRCDS_APPID}}_update.txt -timeout 10 -debuglog logs/latest.log -nobreakpad

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# steamcmd Base Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt -y update
apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 libstdc++6 lib32stdc++6 ca-certificates git

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]; then
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
fi

## Install options (set to "true" to enable)
INSTALL_METAMOD="${INSTALL_METAMOD:-true}"
INSTALL_SOURCEMOD="${INSTALL_SOURCEMOD:-true}"
INSTALL_NOLOBBY="${INSTALL_NOLOBBY:-true}"

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +force_install_dir /mnt/server +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} ${EXTRA_FLAGS} validate +quit

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## AUTOUPDATE FILE
{
    echo '@ShutdownOnFailedCommand 1'
    echo '@NoPromptForPassword 1'
    echo 'login anonymous'
    echo "force_install_dir ../"
    echo "app_update ${SRCDS_APPID}"
    echo 'quit'
} > "${HOME}/steamcmd/${SRCDS_APPID}_update.txt"

## Fix Steam & App ID
ln -sf /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/steam.sh
sed -i 's/appID=730/appID=4465480/' /mnt/server/csgo/steam.inf
mv /mnt/server/bin/libgcc_s.so.1 /mnt/server/bin/libgcc_s.so.1.bak

## CS:GO addon installation
CSGO_DIR="/mnt/server/csgo"
mkdir -p "${CSGO_DIR}"

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installing Metamod:Source..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"
cd /tmp
curl -sSL -o metamod.tar.gz https://mms.alliedmods.net/mmsdrop/2.0/mmsource-2.0.0-git1389-linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf metamod.tar.gz -C "${CSGO_DIR}"
echo "Metamod:Source installation completed."

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installing SourceMod..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"
cd /tmp
curl -sSL -o sourcemod.tar.gz https://sm.alliedmods.net/smdrop/1.13/sourcemod-1.13.0-git7297-linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf sourcemod.tar.gz -C "${CSGO_DIR}"
echo "SourceMod installation completed."

###
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installing NoLobbyReservation..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"
cd /tmp
git clone https://github.com/eldoradoel/NoLobbyReservation.git

PLUGINS_DIR="${CSGO_DIR}/addons/sourcemod/plugins"
SCRIPTING_DIR="${CSGO_DIR}/addons/sourcemod/scripting"
GAMEDATA_DIR="${CSGO_DIR}/addons/sourcemod/gamedata"

mkdir -p "${PLUGINS_DIR}" "${SCRIPTING_DIR}" "${GAMEDATA_DIR}"

# Copy .sp to scripting dir
cp -v NoLobbyReservation/csgo/addons/sourcemod/scripting/nolobbyreservation.sp "${SCRIPTING_DIR}/"
cp -v NoLobbyReservation/csgo/addons/sourcemod/gamedata/nolobbyreservation.games.txt "${GAMEDATA_DIR}/"

# Compile using SourceMod's compiler
cd "${SCRIPTING_DIR}"
chmod +x compile.sh
./compile.sh nolobbyreservation.sp

# Move compiled plugin to plugins dir
if [ -f "compiled/nolobbyreservation.smx" ]; then
    mv -v compiled/nolobbyreservation.smx "${PLUGINS_DIR}/"
    echo "NoLobbyReservation compiled and installed successfully."
else
    echo "ERROR: Compilation failed. Check scripting/compile.sh output above."
fi

rm -rf /tmp/NoLobbyReservation
echo "NoLobbyReservation installation completed."

## Install crash-guard srcds_run (inline — no external download)
echo '-----------------------------------------'
echo 'Installing crash-guard srcds_run...'
echo '-----------------------------------------'

mkdir -p /mnt/server/logs

cat > /mnt/server/srcds_run << 'SRCDS_EOF'
#!/bin/sh

# Copyright (c) 2024. crash-guard srcds_run rewrite.
# Modern, minimal, robust auto-restart wrapper for Source Dedicated Server (srcds).
# Logs crash events, guards against crash loops,
# supports SIGTERM forwarding for clean shutdowns,
# and works reliably in containerized and modern systemd environments.

# ==== CONFIGURATION ====
CRASH_LIMIT=3     # How many crashes within CRASH_WINDOW trigger halt?
CRASH_WINDOW=300  # Window (seconds) to count crashes before halting.

SRCDS_BINARY=./srcds_linux
SRCDS_ARGS="$@"
CRASH_LOGDIR="logs"
CRASH_LOG="$CRASH_LOGDIR/crash_guard.log"
CRASH_TS_FILE=".crash_timestamps"
DEFAULT_GAME="csgo"
DEFAULT_MAP="de_dust"
RESTART=1
TIMEOUT=10
DEBUG=0

### ---- BEGIN: Sanity/Path Setup ----
cd "$(dirname "$0")"
SRCDS_DIR="$(pwd)"

mkdir -p "$CRASH_LOGDIR"

export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$SRCDS_DIR:$SRCDS_DIR/bin:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH"

if [ "$(id -u)" = 0 ]; then
    echo
    echo "************** WARNING ***************"
    echo "Running the dedicated server as root  "
    echo "is highly discouraged and unnecessary."
    echo "**************************************"
    for i in $(seq 10 -1 1); do
        echo -ne "The server will continue to launch in $i seconds\r"
        sleep 1
    done
    echo
fi
### ---- END: Sanity/Path Setup ----

# ==== CRASH-GUARD LOGGING ====
cg_log() {
    local _msg="[crash-guard] $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') $*"
    echo "$_msg"
    echo "$_msg" >> "$CRASH_LOG"
}

cg_record_crash() {
    date +%s >> "$CRASH_TS_FILE"
}

cg_crashes_in_window() {
    local now cutoff ts count=0
    now=$(date +%s)
    cutoff=$(( now - CRASH_WINDOW ))
    if [ -f "$CRASH_TS_FILE" ]; then
        local tmpfile
        tmpfile="${CRASH_TS_FILE}.tmp"
        : > "$tmpfile"
        while IFS= read -r ts; do
            [ -z "$ts" ] && continue
            if [ "${ts#0}" -ge "$cutoff" ] 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "$ts" >> "$tmpfile"
                count=$((count+1))
            fi
        done < "$CRASH_TS_FILE"
        mv "$tmpfile" "$CRASH_TS_FILE"
    fi
    echo "$count"
}

cg_clean_dumps() {
    # Only keep the newest dump of *.mdmp/core/core.*
    local found
    found=$(find "$SRCDS_DIR" \( -name "*.mdmp" -o -name "core" -o -name "core.*" \) -type f 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -n 1)
    [ -z "$found" ] && return
    for f in $(find "$SRCDS_DIR" \( -name "*.mdmp" -o -name "core" -o -name "core.*" \) -type f 2>/dev/null); do
        if [ "$f" != "$found" ]; then
            rm -f -- "$f"
            cg_log "Deleted old crash dump: $(basename "$f")"
        else
            cg_log "Keeping latest crash dump: $(basename "$f")"
        fi
    done
}

# ==== SIGNAL HANDLING ====
HL_PID=""
_shutdown_requested=0

handle_sigterm() {
    _shutdown_requested=1
    cg_log "SIGTERM received — forwarding to server (PID ${HL_PID:-unknown})..."
    if [ -n "$HL_PID" ] && kill -0 "$HL_PID" 2>/dev/null; then
        kill -TERM "$HL_PID" 2>/dev/null
        for _ in $(seq 1 15); do
            sleep 1
            ! kill -0 "$HL_PID" 2>/dev/null && break
        done
        if kill -0 "$HL_PID" 2>/dev/null; then
            cg_log "Server did not exit in 15s — sending SIGKILL."
            kill -KILL "$HL_PID" 2>/dev/null
        fi
    fi
    cg_log "Clean shutdown via SIGTERM."
    rm -f "$CRASH_TS_FILE"
    exit 0
}

trap 'handle_sigterm' TERM

# ==== MAIN RESTART LOOP ====
while :; do
    # Reset crash count on launch
    rm -f "$CRASH_TS_FILE"

    cg_log "Crash-guard active. Limit: $CRASH_LIMIT in $CRASH_WINDOW s."

    # (Optional) Detect for missing game/map and auto-add
    GAME=
    MAP=
    for arg in $SRCDS_ARGS; do
        [ "$GAME" = "" ] && [ "$arg" = "-game" ] && GAME=1 && continue
        [ "$GAME" = 1 ] && GAME="$arg" && continue
        [ "$MAP" = "" ] && [ "$arg" = "+map" ] && MAP=1 && continue
        [ "$MAP" = 1 ] && MAP="$arg" && continue
    done
    if [ -z "$GAME" ] || [ "$GAME" = 1 ]; then
        SRCDS_ARGS="$SRCDS_ARGS -game $DEFAULT_GAME"
        GAME="$DEFAULT_GAME"
    fi
    if [ -z "$MAP" ] || [ "$MAP" = 1 ]; then
        cg_log "No +map specified! Defaulting to $DEFAULT_MAP"
        SRCDS_ARGS="$SRCDS_ARGS +map $DEFAULT_MAP"
    fi

    # Build the launch command
    HL_CMD="$SRCDS_BINARY $SRCDS_ARGS"

    if [ ! -f "$SRCDS_BINARY" ] || [ ! -x "$SRCDS_BINARY" ]; then
        cg_log "ERROR: Server binary '$SRCDS_BINARY' not found or not executable!"
        exit 1
    fi

    cg_log "Starting: $HL_CMD"

    # Work around for TTY signaling in containers (Pterodactyl, etc):
    FIFO="$SRCDS_DIR/.srcds_stdin_$$"
    rm -f "$FIFO"
    mkfifo "$FIFO"
    # keep fd3 to the fifo open so process group doesn't get sigttin from background stdin
    exec 3<>"$FIFO"
    cat <&0 >"$FIFO" &
    RELAY_PID=$!

    $HL_CMD <"$FIFO" &
    HL_PID=$!
    wait $HL_PID
    RET=$?

    exec 3>&-
    kill "$RELAY_PID" 2>/dev/null
    wait "$RELAY_PID" 2>/dev/null
    rm -f "$FIFO"

    # SIGTERM: clean exit immediately
    if [ "$_shutdown_requested" = "1" ]; then
        break
    fi

    if [ "$RET" = "0" ]; then
        cg_log "Server exited normally with code 0."
        break
    fi

    cg_log "Server crashed (exit code $RET)"
    cg_record_crash
    cg_clean_dumps
    crashcount=$(cg_crashes_in_window)
    cg_log "Crashes in past $CRASH_WINDOW s: $crashcount/$CRASH_LIMIT"
    if [ "$crashcount" -ge "$CRASH_LIMIT" ]; then
        cg_log "=========================================================="
        cg_log "CRASH LIMIT HIT ($crashcount crashes in $CRASH_WINDOW s)."
        cg_log "Server halted. See $CRASH_LOG for details."
        cg_log "Restart this script to try again."
        cg_log "=========================================================="
        break
    fi

    cg_log "Sleeping for $TIMEOUT s before restart..."
    sleep $TIMEOUT
done

rm -f "$CRASH_TS_FILE"
echo "Server stopped."
SRCDS_EOF

chmod +x /mnt/server/srcds_run
echo 'Crash-guard srcds_run installed.'

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Map
variables.description: The default map for the server.

variables.name: Steam Account Token
variables.description: The Steam Account Token required for the server to be displayed publicly. Site: https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers

variables.name: Source AppID
variables.description: Required for installation and autoupdate. Do not modify.

variables.name: Map Group
variables.description: The map group/rotation for the server.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players on the server.

variables.name: No Bots
variables.description: Disable bots. 0 = Bots enabled | 1 = Bots disabled.

variables.name: No Master
variables.description: Hide from Steam server browser. 0 = Listed | 1 = Hidden.

variables.name: Insecure (No VAC)
variables.description: Disable VAC anti-cheat. 0 = VAC enabled | 1 = VAC disabled.

variables.name: No HLTV
variables.description: Disable SourceTV/HLTV. 0 = HLTV enabled | 1 = HLTV disabled.
